lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to verify jump range, mass, fuel scoop and internal layout for the exploration fit.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Alternate outfitting planner — cross-checks engineered FSD range, mass budget and power draw for the deep-space build.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Type-11 Prospector ship page — manufacturer specs, speed/boost figures, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, standard-core sizes, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Type-11 Prospector
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, hull mass, optional-internal sizes, and shipyard pricing.

sources.label: Fandom — Type-11 Prospector
sources.what: Lakon Spaceways lore, ship-role reference, and the hull's spec table.
